name: Sanko Diecasting (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Sanko Diecasting (Thailand) Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes aluminum products and parts in Thailand and internationally. Its automotive parts include alternators/motor start parts, fan clutches, air compressors, safety belts, pipes, water coolers, wipers, and audio parts, as well as headlamp heatsink parts; motorcycle parts comprise carburetors, clutches, cosmetic, housing, and frame arm parts; electric products consisting of CCTV and camcorders; and electric air and pump parts. The company also offers home decoration products from brass, copper, iron, and aluminum by lost wax casting; and tractors, grass cutters, oil, and air compressor parts, as well as mower assembly and components in agricultural industry. Sanko Diecasting (Thailand) Public Company Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Rayong, Thailand.
